events.label: assistant
events.text: The pre-entry gas readings show O2 20.9%, H2S 1 ppm, and CO 5 ppm all within acceptable limits, but the LEL reading of 13% exceeds the standard 10% maximum entry threshold — indicating a flammable atmosphere. I wrote a `fail` decision to `/app/answer.json`, flagging the space for ventilation and re-testing before entry can be authorized.
